hero.heading: Command Your Construction with
hero.description: The new frontier of civil engineering where data and execution converge in a single high-performance panoramic view.

transparency.title: Total Transparency
transparency.description: Complete visibility for clients and technical team at each critical stage of the project.

precision.title: Data Precision
precision.description: Exact information gathered in real-time for evidence-based decision making.

technology.title: Cutting-edge Technology
technology.description: Industrial management systems natively integrated with field mobile tools.

schedule.title: Live Schedule
schedule.description: The pulse of your construction transformed into precise metric visualizations.

investor.title: Investor Portal
investor.description: Follow the ROI of your construction with physical versus financial evolution charts. Transparency that values your investment.
investor.financialControl: Financial control in the palm of your hand.
investor.mobileDescription: Our interface was designed for the casual decision maker who demands precise technical data without bureaucratic complexity.

field.title: The Construction Yard Motor
field.description: From the RDO (Daily Work Log) to input management, the field team operates at maximum efficiency through optimized workflows.

offlineFirst.title: Offline-First
offlineFirst.description: Works even without stable connection on site.

measurements.title: Measurements
measurements.description: Conference via laser and project scan.

cases.title: Success Cases
cases.description: Browse the projects that redefined efficiency standards with the BuildTrack platform.

project.name: Industrial Complex Delta
project.quote: Implementing the input tracking system changed our profit margin in just 6 months.
project.author: Ricardo Almeida

waste.title: Waste Management
waste.description: Digital tracking of disposal and reuse of debris, ensuring certified landfills and legal compliance.

carbon.title: Carbon Footprint
carbon.description: Monitoring of logistics and energy consumption for carbon-zero or low environmental impact projects.

certification.title: GreenFlow Certification
certification.description: BuildTrack issues real-time waste management certificates for sustainability audits.

security.title: Data Immutability
security.description: Our infrastructure uses security protocols that make photographic records and RDOs immutable once validated, guaranteeing absolute legal security.

quote1.quote: The transparency of BuildTrack zeroed communication noise with our investors. The buyer portal became our main closing tool.
quote1.author: Carlos Mendes

quote2.quote: Identifying schedule deviations before they become costs is what differentiates a profitable construction from a headache.
quote2.author: Mariana Silva

erp.question: Integration with market ERPs?
erp.answer: Yes. Our native RESTful API connects with Sienge, TOTVS and SAP, ensuring bidirectional sync between financial and construction.

offline.question: Offline operation?
offline.answer: The mobile app is offline-first. Stores photos and data locally and syncs automatically as soon as network is available.

storage.question: Storage limits?
storage.answer: Our Enterprise plans include unlimited storage for projects and photographic records in AWS cloud.
